Subject: US Trade - next steps

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
All,

We agreed a number of actions when we met earlier. By way of a quick recap, the
main workstrands and actions were as follows:

RK

I'd welcome updates by close tomorrow so we can do a summary note if
needed on the different strands above.

Ailsa
